commands.repair_reason: The PR has no actionable repair finding and carries a protected maintainer label, so the remaining action is maintainer review and landing or closure.; Cleared: The diff only changes diagnostic text plumbing, a focused test, and changelog text; it does not add dependencies, permissions, network calls, secret handling, or tool execution capability. commands.review_summary:
The branch threads a memory-compaction unavailable-core-tool reason through the tool policy warning pipeline, adds focused formatter coverage, and records a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main reduces memory-triggered tools to `read` and `write`, then the shared warning formatter emits only the generic runtime/provider/model/config explanation. I did not run a live gateway memory-flush path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR has no actionable repair finding and carries a protected `maintainer` label, so the remaining action is maintainer review and landing or closure.
